Stuart Anderson MP Demands Answers Over Ongoing A49 Roadworks at Onibury

Saturday, 2 May, 2026
The A49 roadworks at Onibury were first raised by Stuart Anderson MP in November 2025. National Highways gave assurances in March 2026 that works would be completed by the end of April 2026. Stuart has now requested an urgent meeting with National Highways to secure a clear explanation. Stuart Anderson MP said: “I am extremely disappointed to have written to National Highways requesting a meeting...
